message:
fix(node): NaN/Inf guards in perf_budget_guard budget checks to prevent fail-open bypass

connector/perf_budget_guard: add is_finite() preconditions to within_budget
computation so NaN/Inf baseline or integrated measurements fail closed
instead of silently passing the budget gate.

policy/perf_budget_guard: add is_finite() guards to budget violation
checks and NaN/Inf rejection in TimingCollector record_baseline,
record_integrated, and record_cold_start inputs.

12 regression tests added across both modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
